topic: Managing Employee Payment Modes and Bank Details
summary: This topic explains how to enter and manage employee bank details and specify the preferred payment mode (e.g., RTGS, Cheque) for salary disbursement.
steps: Locate and navigate to the 'Salary Details' section.
Enter the employee's 'Bank Name', 'Branch', 'Account Number', 'IFSC Code', and any other relevant bank information.
In the 'Payment Mode' field, specify the method of payment, such as 'RTGS' or 'Cheque'.
Save the employee details after entering the bank information.
business_rules: The bank details (Bank Name, Branch, Account Number, IFSC) entered in this section will be reflected on the employee's salary slip.
important_notes: Specifying 'Cheque' in the payment mode field can be used for internal tracking and reporting purposes.
If a dedicated pop-up for payment mode remarks is not available, specific notes about payment methods can be added in the general remarks section.
Once saved, these bank and payment mode details are permanently stored and do not need to be re-entered each month for salary processing.
questions: How do I add an employee's bank account details for salary payment?
Where can I specify if an employee's salary should be paid via cheque or RTGS?
Will the bank details I enter appear on the employee's salary slip?
Do I need to update bank details every month?
